text: Migrated off Mailchimp to this and open rates went up. The Shopify sync is a bit slow though.
Best tool in its class. We compared it against Airtable and Smartsheet for two months.
The mobile app logs me out constantly. Never had this problem with Evernote.
Decent but the onboarding docs assume you already know what a webhook is.
Our agency manages campaigns for Nike and Patagonia through this platform with zero hiccups.
